title: ShotMap
description: Output of 07_2_narration_shot_mapping: the narration-to-shot mapping. For each beat, the ordered short shots physically extracted from the downloader lane's clips that together cover that beat's narration. Source-free, consistent with the downloader lane (a clip is identified only by its neutral clip_id + file_ref, never a platform/url/creator/license).

narration_duration_s.description: The narration duration this beat's shots were mapped to cover (from 09_audio_production's audio_mix.json, falling back to the beat's est_duration_s when no narration stem exists).

shots.description: Ordered shots covering the narration window. Empty only if the beat had no scored clip at all.

asset_id.description: The extracted shot's asset_id in assets_manifest.json (its file_ref is the extracted short clip).

source_clip_id.description: Neutral clip_id of the downloader clip this shot was cut from (from scene_scores/downloader_manifest).

source_file_ref.description: Repo-relative path of the source downloader clip.

source_in_s.description: Start of the window cut from the source clip.

source_out_s.description: End of the window cut from the source clip.

extracted_file_ref.description: Repo-relative path of the physically-extracted short shot file.

duration_s.description: Actual (ffprobed) duration of the extracted shot file.

narration_start_s.description: Start offset within this beat's narration that this shot covers.

narration_end_s.description: End offset within this beat's narration that this shot covers.
